## 6.0.5
** April 6, 2026**
* Added automatic FAQ Schema generation on accordions containing FAQs
* Fixed Drupal error generated by CTAs
* Updated give link
* Theme option added to adjust site name styles
* Simplified markup for status alerts (refactor, no change necessary needed on existing implementations)
* Removed NPM vulnerabilities

## 6.0.4
**March 16, 2026**
* Style updates for [schedule component](/patterns/molecules/schedule)
* Style fixes for announcements and dialogs


## 6.0.3
**March 2, 2026**
* Documentation for component use updated throughout this site
* New org chart styles to accompany block type
* Style updates for Slate and MABEL

## 6.0.2
**February 2, 2026**
* Docusaurus updated
* Styles for MABEL updated for CEDAR launch
* Slate style overrides added
* Alert icons added
* NPM audit
* Minor accordion bug fixed

## 6.0.1
**January 6, 2026**
* Card, banner, and navigation style fixes
* Catalog implementation updates for 6.0 release
